description:
After fz-ty1.pip.1 lands, the inliner maintains ModuleTypes itself. Remove the redundant type_module call at line 1834 of ir_codegen.rs.

## What to change

ir_codegen.rs, around line 1823:
  - Change: let module_types = crate::ir_typer::type_module(&working);  // call 3
  - To:     let mut module_types = crate::ir_typer::type_module(&working);  // call 3

Pass &mut module_types to inline_single_use_conts (signature from fz-ty1.pip.1).

Delete the synthetic 4th call (currently line 1834):
  - Delete: let module_types = crate::ir_typer::type_module(&working);

## Acceptance
- cargo clippy -- -D warnings passes.
- All tests pass.
- type_module is called exactly 3 times in the pipeline (verified by fz-ty1.pip.3).
- One commit referencing fz-ty1.pip.2.
title: fz-ty1.pip.2: eliminate synthetic 4th type_module call in pipeline
